div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: author: Device: identifier = http://example.com/CIS-ID#12345; manufacturer = Some Clinical Information System Manufacturer; modelNumber = 2.0.1; type = Clinical information system
title: Patient Summary for Joyce Johnson as of 07 NOV 2024

title.value: Patient Summary for Joyce Johnson as of 07 NOV 2024

tr.th: Date/time of onset of first reaction

tr.td: Pt stated had prawns with dinner and noticed itchy throat, never experienced this before
10 units subcutaneously in the morning and evening
Recent diagnosis, referring to Endo & Dietitian
Patient reported symptoms of UTI. MSU to confirm
Diphtheria + tetanus + pertussis 5 component adolescent/adult vaccine injection, 0.5 mL syringe
Pt reported localised redness and swelling post previous flu vax last year. Monitor for rxn.
COVID-19 mRNA-1273 Vaccine (Moderna) injection, 0.5 mL syringe
First degree burn, Upper shoulders and back
Severe sunburn, upper shoulders and back

text.div: Pregnancy confirmed 12/06/2024. Estimated Date of Delivery 03/02/2025.

tr.td: Org 1 Amp/Amoxycillin: Susceptible Amox/clav. acid: Susceptible Cephalexin: Susceptible Trimethoprim: Susceptible Nitrofurantoin: Susceptible Gentamicin: Susceptible Norfloxacin: Susceptible
Full Blood Count - White Blood Cell Count
